intro: A hydrothermal trench yawns open in the seabed, its vents glowing faintly in the crushing dark. Mineral shards encrust every ledge, but something vast shifts in the black water below.
title: The Abyssal Vent
description: A mineral-rich trench in the deep seabed. Descend it level by level for a growing haul, loose shards giving way to real mineral wealth and, deep in, a rare curio, but every level down risks waking a deep-sea guardian. Rise early to keep the safe haul, or dive deeper for more.

1.label: Dive the trench
1.tooltip:
(+) Gather wealth level by level
(?) Each descent raises the chance of an ambush
1.selected: You vent your buoyancy and sink into the glowing dark...

2.label: Stay shallow
2.selected: You leave the trench to the deep and move on.

divePrompt: You have recovered {{diveCount}} finds{{treasureNote}}. The water grows colder and blacker the deeper you go. Dive on, or rise back up with your haul?

push.label: Dive deeper
push.tooltip:
(+) Richer wealth deeper down
(?) Higher chance something wakes

foundShards: You pry loose a cluster of shards and pocket the money they fetch.
foundNothing: This ledge is bare rock, scoured clean by the current. You find nothing of worth.
foundNugget: Fused to a glowing vent, a fat metallic Nugget breaks free - worth a small fortune!
foundCurio: Encrusted on the trench wall, you work loose a valuable curio and stow it away.
foundKingsRock: Set into a vent chimney sits a heavy, crowned stone - a King's Rock! A genuinely rare find.
foundMegaStone: Deep in the trench, a stone pulses with a strange inner light - a Mega Stone! You stow it carefully.
trenchStirs: The dark water erupts! A deep-sea guardian heaves up from the trench floor - the money you have recovered is safely in your bag. Drive it off and you can keep diving!
